subject: Pansage — small green monkey-like creature with a leafy head tuft, perched on a branch amid green foliage.
description: A small green primate creature sits on a tree branch surrounded by bright green leaves and foliage. The creature has a round head topped with a darker green leafy tuft, large eyes, and a cheerful open-mouthed expression. Its body is light green with paler belly. The background is dense green vegetation and light filtering through leaves. The scene is bright and lush.
foreground: small green monkey creature on branch with leafy head tuft
